meta.title: Arnaud Akoèno AFEDIKOU — Full Stack Developer & UI/UX Designer
meta.description: I build modern, high-performance, scalable web applications while crafting elegant and intuitive interfaces.

hero.name: Arnaud Akoèno AFEDIKOU
hero.description: I design modern, high-performance, scalable web applications, and I craft elegant interfaces people actually want to use. Every project is treated as a finished product, from the code to the user experience.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Who I am, and how I work
about.paragraph1: A passionate Full Stack Developer, I design digital products end-to-end: from the most robust backend architecture down to the very last pixel of an interface. My journey has led me to work on complex REST APIs as well as complete brand identities, giving me a rare perspective — I understand code as well as design, and I know how to make the two work together.
about.paragraph2: My technical curiosity keeps pushing me to explore new tools — React, Django, Node.js, NestJS — while holding on to one simple principle: technology only has value if it serves a clear, fast and enjoyable human experience. That belief guides every decision I make, from a software architecture choice to a color palette.
about.paragraph3: My goal is simple: ship products I'm proud of, both for their technical quality and for how they feel to the end user. I work just as well independently as within a team, always with the same rigor, communication and respect for deadlines.
